× Pesa Partnership Proposal

High Tea
with a Twist

The Afro-Caribbean Vibrant Culture
meets the British Elegance

DateMay 23, 2026
VenueLAST Modern Events, Edmonton
Time12 Noon — 4 PM
Guests60 Intentional Women
The Opportunity

60 women who already
send money home.
In one room. For 4 hours.

The Busy Mamas Network is a Canadian community for Afro-Caribbean millennial moms — immigrants and first-gen Canadians who actively send money to Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Cameroon and beyond. Many are already Pesa users. This is your chance to meet them face to face.

01 / 06
Why This Audience Is Pesa's Audience
Their Reality
Sending money home every month
To Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Jamaica, Cameroon — supporting family, running businesses, paying school fees back home
Pesa's Promise
Move money across borders. Break free from fees, delays and complexity.
Zero fees, multi-currency wallet, best live rates — built exactly for this woman
Their Community
Word of mouth is their most trusted currency
These women convert through trusted recommendations in community spaces like this — word of mouth is everything
The Proof
20 verified sign-ups in one afternoon
At a previous BMN event, Pesa onboarded 20 fully verified users in a single session. The community converts.

The Investment
Sponsorship Investment
$10,000
Exclusive Fintech Category Sponsor
🔒 Category Exclusivity
No competing payments or money transfer brand will be present at the event, in our content or on our materials. Pesa owns the room.
The exact structure is open to discussion — we want to build something that works for Pesa's goals. Let's talk.
What Pesa Gets
🎯
Live Brand ActivationA dedicated moment to introduce Pesa, demo the app and onboard users in real time — the same format that produced 20 verified sign-ups at our last event
🎁
Gift Bag InclusionPesa branded insert or promo in all 60 gift bags — your brand goes home with every guest
📱
Pre & Post Social CampaignDedicated content across both organizers' platforms — 1M+ organic reach in the last 30 days
🌍
Community Trust TransferOne endorsement here travels to families across Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Jamaica and beyond via word of mouth
📊
Post-Event ReportFull reach, attendance, engagement and conversion data within 7 days

and build community.
